message:
style(sync): collapse prepare_jsonl_temp_output signature to one line

No semantic change. rustfmt now keeps the
`fn prepare_jsonl_temp_output(output_path: &Path, config:
&ExportConfig) -> Result<JsonlTempOutput> {` signature on a
single line — it fits under the project line-length budget
comfortably and matches the one-line shape used by the sibling
helpers (rename_jsonl_temp_output, sync_jsonl_writer). No body
change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
